name: Milestone Bar
description: Horizontal milestone rail for company history, funding journeys, and 'how we got here' narratives — collapses to a vertical timeline on mobile so the rail metaphor never breaks responsively.

descriptions.descriptive: A thin horizontal hairline rail with anchor dots at each milestone, monospaced markers (years or quarter labels) above bold short titles. Optional metric chips and one-line descriptions hang under each anchor. Mobile collapses to a left-rail vertical timeline.
descriptions.usage: Best on About pages, investor decks rendered as web pages, and anniversary or product-launch retrospectives. Pair after a brand-statement hero and before a team or testimonial section to ground the story in concrete dates.
descriptions.audienceFit: Established companies, funded startups telling their journey, and brand-led services pages where the trust signal comes from longevity. Reads as confident without sliding into self-congratulatory language.
